{{Infobox concept
| name = Nye essence
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Nye essence Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nye]] [[essence]] is the fundamental core of [[life]] and power for [[the Nye]], a race of humanoid beings composed entirely of shadow and cloth rather than flesh. This [[essence]] manifests as a blue-white or moonlight light that serves as the source of their existence and supernatural abilities. When utilized by individuals, the [[essence]] provides a significant enhancement to physical capabilities, most notably by slowing down the perception of time. This temporal dilation allows a user to perceive the world as if it were moving through thick honey, granting them heightened reaction speeds, increased grace, and improved coordination. Users often describe the sensation of inhaling the [[essence]] as a rush of freezing air, similar to breathing in a blizzard or a hurricane. While it provides these combat and movement advantages, the power is temporary and can be difficult to maintain, often feeling as though it is slipping away like steam. The [[essence]] is deeply tied to the nature of the [[Territory]] of [[Valinhall]], representing the very heart of what defines that realm.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] [[essence]] is a type of power that [[Simon]] draws upon, providing a chill that imbues the user with increased speed. While using this [[essence]] to fill his lungs, [[Simon]] experiences a sensation of his lungs burning with ice and struggles with a lack of the reflexes the power typically provides. This [[essence]] has the ability to slow down time for [[Simon]], making a giant lizard feel as though it is pushing through jelly. Although the power can fade, [[Simon]] attempts to call it up and must hold onto it in order to follow [[the Nye]]. Ultimately, [[Simon]] draws on the [[essence]] to match the [[steel]] within him.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]]'s [[essence]] provides a chill that imbues the user with speed.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Nye essence]] is a type of [[essence]] [[Simon]] uses.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] lacks the reflexes provided by the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] used [[Nye essence]] to fill his lungs.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nye essence]] is a power that can fade.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nye essence]] can slow down time/scenes for [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Drawing on [[Nye essence]] can make [[Simon]]'s lungs feel like they are burning with ice.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nye essence]] is a power [[Simon]] tried to call up.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] must hold onto [[Nye essence]] to follow [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nye essence]] can make a giant lizard feel as if it is pushing through jelly.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can draw on the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] draws [[Nye essence]] to match the [[steel]] in him.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nye]] [[essence]] is a specific type of [[essence]] that carries the sensation of inhaling a blizzard and can even cause a person's lungs to freeze. Throughout his battles, [[Simon]] utilizes this power to fuel his movements, slow down the world around him, and slip in and out of combat, even using it to land a significant blow on [[Chaka]]. While [[Simon]] must eventually work to restore his supply, other individuals demonstrate unique interactions with the substance, such as [[Indirial]] using it for high-speed travel and [[Valin]] possessing the ability to summon it. The [[essence]]'s strange properties are further evidenced when [[Valin]]'s blood drops hang oddly within its presence.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nye essence]] feels like inhaling a blizzard when drawn in.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] used [[Nye essence]] to land a real blow on [[Chaka]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nye essence]] can slow the world for [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nye essence]] is a type of [[essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] uses [[Nye essence]] to move at high speeds.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] uses [[Nye essence]] to power his movements.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] needs to restore his [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Valin]] can summon [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] drew on the [[Nye essence]] to slip in and out of combat.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nye essence]] can cause lungs to freeze.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Valin]]'s blood drops hang oddly in the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] uses his [[Nye essence]] in combat.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] possess a unique [[essence]] that [[Simon]] is able to perceive and utilize. When called upon, this energy causes a chill in the lungs and slows down the perception of time, making an instant feel much longer. While [[Simon]] himself does not possess this power, [[Indirial]] does, and its effects can be seen in individuals who move with unnatural speed and grace. The [[essence]] can roar into the lungs like a freezing hurricane, allowing for a casual glide, though releasing it returns the world to near-normal speed.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Calling upon the [[Nye essence]] causes a chill in the lungs and slows down the world.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A man in the graveyard was moving fast, suggesting he was holding [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nye essence]] can increase a person's speed and grace.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] does not possess the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] possesses [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Nye essence]] can roar into the lungs like a freezing hurricane.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Releasing [[Nye essence]] can return the world to almost normal speed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nye essence]] is a substance or energy that [[Simon]] can perceive and use.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nye essence]] allows for a casual glide.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Nye essence]] can make an instant feel much longer.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] have an [[essence]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
